text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Ikuno. It's not much, 
but I have a present for you as well.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh? You didn't have to, but thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: …Aw, I didn't know you guys were so close.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When you put it so plainly, I do feel 
a bit bashful, but…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
From having the proper mindset before 
a race to the importance of thinking ahead, 
I've learned much from Ikuno's example.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So I guess you're kinda like a mentor 
to McQueen then, huh, Ikuno?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I find it difficult to believe myself, but if my 
advice has been of use to you, then I'm glad.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Did you find the list of places with low-calorie 
sweets I gave you the other day helpful?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
About that… it's embarrassing to admit, 
but I've already been to all of them. 
I cannot thank you enough…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha… Guess you look to Ikuno's advice 
for a lot more than just racing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-Anyhow, I'm grateful for all you do, 
and hope you'll allow me to gleam more 
knowledge from you in the future.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Of course, you can expect more tips 
on new sweets to try.
